positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
2. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => ~has_teeth(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => mammal(X0)) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => (mammal(X0) & ~has_teeth(X0))) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => (mammal(X0) & ~has_teeth(X0))) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ! [X0] : (~has_teeth(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. ! [X0] : (mammal(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
12. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
15. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) => ((~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1)) & platypus(sK1)) [skolem symbol introduction]
16. (~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1)) & platypus(sK1) [skolemisation 12,15]
19. ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
20. ~platypus(X0) | mammal(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
24. platypus(sK1) [cnf transformation 16]
25. ~mammal(sK1) | has_teeth(sK1) [cnf transformation 16]
27. 1 <=> has_teeth(sK1) [avatar definition]
31. 2 <=> mammal(sK1) [avatar definition]
33. ~mammal(sK1) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 31]
34. 1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 25,31,27]
35. ~has_teeth(sK1) [resolution 19,24]
37. ~1 [avatar split clause 35,27]
38. mammal(sK1) [resolution 20,24]
40. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 38,33]
41. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 40]
s1. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 34]
s2. ~1 [sat_conversion 37]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 41]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
42. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:

    ~has_teeth(p)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    platypus(p)).
